etymology.description: 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") + 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") = repeated mouths -> sound of people crying out
etymology.interpretation: 吅(xuān, "cry") is formed by two instances of 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth"), symbolizing multiple mouths producing sound together, reflecting the idea of crying out loud or making a noise.
